poolId.description: Stable identifier of the pool or runner group.

poolName.description: Display name of the pool or runner group.

instanceId.description: Stable identifier of the stopped agent or runner instance.

instanceName.description: Display name or hostname for the instance before deprovision.

stopReason.description: Optional normalized reason the instance was deprovisioned.

details.description: Provider-specific metadata for this lifecycle event, such as final health status or drain telemetry.
